feast_block.title: Place and share a Farmer's Delight feast block (Roast Chicken, Ham, Ratatouille, etc.)

subtitle.text: The feast is the goal. The factory is how you feed enough people.

description: The food system was never just about survival.
It was about what you eat with, and who you eat with.
The feast block feeds everyone at the table.
Farmer's Delight feast blocks (Roast Chicken, Honey Glazed Ham)
place like a cake and can be eaten by multiple players.
In multiplayer, this is the reason you built the kitchen.
The Engineered Cuisine scroll records what happens
when industrial capacity meets the kitchen.
Someone took notes. You are reading them.
→ Cook 4 Honey Glazed Hams (FD cooking chain)
→ Place and share a feast block [check]
